package rulecoverage

func PositiveMiddlewareRebindsBodyAfterHandlerBind() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_rebinds_body_after_handler_bind"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Middleware or helper chains that parse the request body after the main handler has already bound it."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
